author: anon-ab6221f8
content: Implementing GH #361 per the design-doc revision in the issue's second comment (Q1 resolved: direct file mutation, no SchedulingUpdated event). Schema is actually at v16 so migration is 16->17 (original spec said 15->16). Approach: single branch with 4 logical commits — data model+DB, hydration+shared_writer, CLI+commands, tests. Using FieldUpdate<T>{Unchanged|Set|Clear} enum in update_issue rather than Option<Option<T>> for clarity. Using ripsed to bulk-add 'scheduled_at: None, due_at: None' to the ~91 Issue struct literals in tests, anchored on the preceding 'closed_at:' line.
